theme_and_archetype.archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast Government Authority) + Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)
theme_and_archetype.description: A fullscreen web application imitating a futuristic desktop OS for police dispatch/MDT. It blends modern, sleek glassmorphism panels with high-contrast neon accents, maintaining a dark, authoritative environment.

rules: Headings in the MDT and Login screen must use Rajdhani with uppercase transformation.
Terminal logs and data grid rows must use JetBrains Mono.
Win98 Retro theme must switch to Pixelify Sans or a classic retro font for authenticity.

window_manager.description: Framer Motion based draggable windows (z-index handling, drag constraints, minimize/maximize/close).
window_manager.styling: In modern dark: use 'Crystal Glass' (bg-white/5 or bg-black/40 with backdrop-blur-xl), 1px neon blue border. In Win98: flat #C0C0C0 with outset borders.

taskbar.description: Bottom fixed bar containing Start button, pinned apps, active windows, system tray (clock).
taskbar.styling: Modern dark: translucent dark bar with neon glow on active tabs. Win98: solid gray, inset borders.

start_menu.description: Popup launcher above the start button. Contains search input, categories, pinned apps.
start_menu.styling: Dense grid bento layout, blurry background, sharp corners.

mdt_terminal.description: The centerpiece app. A tactical grid dashboard.
mdt_terminal.styling: Dense bento grid layout (gap-4). Deep black background inside the app. Use JetBrains Mono. Primary buttons should be #FFD000. Incorporate a subtle repeating-linear-gradient for CRT scanlines overlay.

desktop_icons.description: Grid-snapping icons. Right-click context menus, double click to open.
desktop_icons.styling: Transparent buttons, text-shadow for readability over wallpaper.

boot_screen.description: Initial load sequence simulating a kernel BIOS boot.
boot_screen.styling: Pure black background, JetBrains Mono, neon blue or green text, fast typewriter effect.

login_screen.description: Lock screen displaying avatar, badge num, name, and 'remember me'.
login_screen.styling: Center aligned, heavy blur on background wallpaper, glowing inputs.

motion_and_interactions.app_launch: Scale up from 0.8 and fade in (duration: 0.2s)
motion_and_interactions.boot_sequence: Staggered text lines appearing instantly, followed by a fast scrolling effect.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have high contrast hover (e.g., bg-blue-900 to bg-blue-700), scale up slightly on desktop icons.
motion_and_interactions.crt_flicker: Optional subtle opacity keyframe animation on the MDT terminal container to simulate screen refresh.

instructions_to_main_agent.language: All UI text must be in Czech language as requested.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_system: Implement a global context or Zustand store to toggle between 'modern' and 'retro' themes. This should dynamically swap Tailwind classes or CSS variables.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, window controls, and form inputs MUST include 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for system icons (close, min, max, file, folder, app icons).
instructions_to_main_agent.data_persistence: Use localStorage for Sticky Notes content, wallpaper preferences, and current theme.
